description_long: This object consists of two crossed axes with robust, dark brown wooden handles and large, angular steel heads. The handles are straight with a slight taper and appear to be wrapped or reinforced for grip, showing a polygonal, faceted design. The axe heads are broad and wedge-shaped, with a metallic gray finish and subtle red stains or highlights near the blade edges, suggesting recent use or stylized wear. The blades are single-edged, with a pronounced, slightly curved cutting edge and a thick poll at the rear. The overall design is stylized and blocky, with exaggerated proportions typical of fantasy or game environments. No visible markings, engravings, or brand labels are present on the surface.
description: A pair of crossed, stylized axes with dark wooden handles and large, angular steel heads featuring red highlights and a polygonal design.
description_view_0: Front view showing both axes crossed, highlighting the broad steel blades and the full length of the wooden handles.
description_view_1: Side view showing the narrow profile of the axe heads and the thickness of the handles.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, displaying the crossed arrangement and the back of the axe heads.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slim profile of the axe heads and the handle alignment.
attribute_handle_type: Straight, dark brown wooden handles with a polygonal cross-section and slight taper, reinforced for grip.
attribute_blade_design: Large, angular, single-edged steel blades with a slightly curved edge and thick poll, featuring red highlights.
attribute_mounting_style: Traditional wedged mounting with the blade fitted over the handle end.
